prompt: A grand old library with towering floor-to-ceiling bookshelves filled with leather-bound volumes. A wooden rolling ladder leans against the shelves. A wooden desk in the foreground holds an open book and a brass reading lamp. An ornate arched ceiling with coffers rises above. Warm ambient light from the lamp and overhead fixtures. Above, the coffered ceiling features a painted fresco at its center, partially obscured by the upper shelves, and a heavy iron chandelier with candle-shaped bulbs hangs from the vault. Below desk level, a Persian rug covers the dark wood floor, and a leather armchair with a folded blanket sits beside a side table with a teacup. First-person viewer. First-person view at desk level looking across the open book and lamp toward the bookshelves and arched ceiling. No held objects.

tracking_object.desc: brass reading lamp on the desk

scene_adherence.visible_part: A grand old library has towering floor-to-ceiling bookshelves filled with volumes. A wooden rolling ladder leans against the bookshelves. A wooden desk sits in the foreground, holding an open book and a reading lamp. An ornate arched ceiling with coffers rises above the library space.
scene_adherence.offscreen_part: The volumes filling the bookshelves are leather-bound. The reading lamp on the foreground desk is made of brass. The space is filled with warm ambient light from the lamp and overhead fixtures. The coffered ceiling features a painted fresco at its center, which is partially obscured by the upper shelves. A heavy iron chandelier with candle-shaped bulbs hangs from the ceiling vault. Below desk level, a Persian rug covers the dark wood floor. A leather armchair with a folded blanket sits beside a side table that holds a teacup.
